home.title: Hoasen - Crafting the Future of Blockchain & Fintech
home.description: Hoasen is a blockchain and fintech development studio based in the UAE. We help startups and enterprises build and launch products on chain — from smart contracts and DApps to AI-driven fintech solutions.

works.title: Our Work Examples | Hoasen
works.description: Explore Hoasen's portfolio: Ocean Finance (RWA tokenisation), PowerTrade (crypto options), Crypto Paradise, bspin, TripTips, and more — spanning fintech, blockchain, and enterprise software.

about.title: About Us | Hoasen
about.description: Hoasen is a blockchain and fintech development studio based in the UAE. We partner with startups and enterprises to design, build, and ship products on chain — from smart contracts and DApps to AI-driven fintech.

capability-blockchain-development.title: Blockchain Development

capability-frontend.description: Focused on designing and developing visually appealing, responsive user interfaces.

capability-mobile.title: Mobile
capability-mobile.description: Building performant native and cross-platform mobile applications.

capability-backend.title: BackEnd
capability-backend.description: Specializing in building scalable and secure backend systems for web and mobile applications.

capability-artificial-intelligence.title: Artificial Intelligence
capability-artificial-intelligence.description: Integrating AI-driven solutions to automate workflows, enhance products, and unlock new capabilities.

capability-product-design-management.title: Product Design & Product Management
capability-product-design-management.description: Designing intuitive digital experiences and driving product strategy from discovery to delivery.

capability-test-automation.title: Test Automation
capability-test-automation.description: Ensuring product quality through automated testing pipelines, blockchain-specific validation, and end-to-end coverage.

team.title: Our team & Values
team.introLine1: Hoasen is built up of a team of <bold>high-performing</bold> individuals in the fintech space.
team.introLine2: We know what <bold>world-class</bold> looks like, and our team has <bold>domain knowledge</bold>.
team.introLine3: This enables us to <bold>move quickly</bold>, reduce handoffs, and avoid
team.introLine4: bureaucratic processes that slow teams down.

domainExpertise.title: Domain Expertise
domainExpertise.description: Deep fintech knowledge, building systems that process millions daily.

agileExecution.title: Agile Execution
agileExecution.description: Lean team, fast delivery cutting through red tape for swift results.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: No black box clear documentation and open communication at every step.

worldClass.title: World-Class Quality
worldClass.description: We don't just meet standards; we set them.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.cultureBody: At the heart of our team is a culture of trust, respect, and continuous growth. We support one another, celebrate wins together, and learn quickly from challenges. By staying open, curious, and collaborative, we create space for great ideas to emerge and for everyone to do their best work.
